notes: Haste is Frost's top secondary — gem Int/Haste once hit-capped. Sinister Primal Diamond is the legendary meta from Wrathion's questline. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
